tour.welcome.title: Welcome to MD Studio
tour.welcome.desc: A zero-dependency, offline-capable Markdown editor. Would you like a quick tour?
tour.s1.title: Welcome to MD Studio
tour.s1.desc: A zero-dependency, offline-capable Markdown editor — all data stays local.
tour.s2.title: New / Open File
tour.s2.desc: "New" creates a blank tab; "Open" lets you pick a .md or .txt file from your device.
tour.s3.title: Multi-Tab Management
tour.s3.desc: Work on multiple documents at once. Click to switch, + to add, × to close.
tour.s4.title: Markdown Editor
tour.s4.desc: Type Markdown here for live preview on the right, with syntax highlighting.
tour.s4m.desc: Type Markdown here. Swipe left or right to toggle between edit and preview.
tour.s5.title: Live Preview
tour.s5.desc: Renders Markdown in real time — Mermaid diagrams, tables, and code highlighting supported.
tour.s6.title: Toolbar
tour.s6.desc: Apply formatting quickly: bold, italic, headings, lists, links, and more. Click ⌨ for all shortcuts.
tour.s6m.title: Bottom Toolbar
tour.s6m.desc: Touch-friendly buttons for common formatting: bold, italic, headings, lists, and more.
tour.s7.title: Google Drive
tour.s7.desc: Sign in to open and save files directly from Google Drive. Requires a Client ID in Settings.
tour.s8.title: Typography Style
tour.s8.desc: Switch the preview font style: Default, Reading, Compact, Document, or Wide.
tour.s9.title: Status Bar
tour.s9.desc: Shows live word and line counts, plus auto-save status on the left.
tour.s10.title: Outline Panel
tour.s10.desc: Click the pulsing ○ button at the bottom-right to open the Outline panel. It lists all headings — click any to jump there.
tour.s2m.title: Mode Toggle / Swipe
tour.s2m.desc: Tap the buttons to switch between Edit and Preview, or swipe left/right to toggle.
tour.s10m.title: Side Menu
tour.s10m.desc: Tap ☰ for the side menu: new file, download, cloud sync, language, and settings.
